narrative:
Bloom Twp township has 1,022 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
